hero_subtitle: SFTY provides regulators with an evidence-ready platform that preserves audit trails, governs access, and structures digital asset oversight across fragmented data and providers.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Institutional trust weakens without audit control
problem_description: Regulators face challenges maintaining clear access governance and evidence integrity across dispersed supervisory data. This creates gaps in defensible decision history and complicates regulatory workflows in sensitive digital asset environments.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY centralizes supervisory data, preserves detailed audit logs, manages access governance and links decisions with case evidence to support transparent and defensible regulatory workflows.
workflow_title: From market signals to supervisory reports
workflow_description: SFTY helps regulators connect market signals through alerts, cases, investigations, supervisory actions and evidence into reviewable reports.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides regulators with a connected supervisory layer that links market data, entity context, cases, evidence and reporting for clear, auditable oversight.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY provides regulators with secure deployment, controlled access, evidence-grade logging and procurement-safe architecture for audit-ready, accountable digital asset supervision environments.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY support secure supervisory trust and auditability
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how supervisory decisions preserve audit-grade evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how role-based access governs sensitive regulatory data
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe multi-provider orchestration in government compliance workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides regulators with a supervisory layer that connects entity data, transactions, wallets, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule messages, cases and reporting for clear market oversight.
faq_2_question: How can SFTY support supervisory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports workflows by linking alerts, cases, evidence and supervisory actions into structured processes, helping regulators prioritize risk and streamline investigations within one platform.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence with audit-grade logging to support reviews remain traceable and defensible over time.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing government systems?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports modular integration with government registries, reporting systems and internal workflows, enabling phased deployment with access governance and audit controls.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing analytics tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing analytics tools, connecting multiple provider outputs into a connected supervisory environment without replacing them.
final_title: Review secure supervisory infrastructure with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports evidence-grade logging, access governance and structured workflows for regulated authorities.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
